name: Hacker AI
author: BTEHub Solutions
description: Hacker AI is an AI-powered source code review tool that scans your codebase for security vulnerabilities like SQL injection, command injection, and file inclusion. Simply upload your source code, and within minutes it delivers a detailed vulnerability report straight to your inbox. It supports multiple programming languages and helps developers identify and fix weaknesses before they can be exploited. Built by a French ybersecurity company, it's designed for organizations and individuals conducting authorized security assessments.
